product: Genie One favorite and filtering improvements
tagline: Mark assets as favorites: Click the star icon next to asset names in Genie One to mark them as favorites.
what_it_does: Mark assets as favorites: Click the star icon next to asset names in Genie One to mark them as favorites. Favorite and certified content filtering: Filter content by favorite and certified status in Genie One. Genie One is the simplified Databricks UI for business users, a single entry point for interacting with data and AI without navigating technical concepts like compute, queries, models, or notebooks.
why_it_matters: Genie One enables users to: View and interact with AI/BI dashboards to track key performance indicators (KPIs) and analyze metrics.
key_takeaway: Mark assets as favorites: Click the star icon next to asset names in Genie One to mark them as favorites.
